title: Diamond Upgrade
description: Upgrade your items to diamond ones.
body:
## Features
* This data pack adds the diamond ingot which can upgrade all items to diamond ones.  
## Recipes
* **To make diamond ingot,**  
Drop a stone pickaxe onto a crafting table block to spawn a working table.  
![the recipe of diamond ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aNM8pAgS/images/f63b3b01508d7771627203b5ba1ed58d4f8d48e4.png)  
Remember to click the "Knowledge Book".

* **To upgrade your items,**  
Drop a "Book and Quil" onto a bookshelf block to spawn a scribing table.  
Complete the recipe below and click the "Quill", the item will be upgraded to a diamond one in the right slot.  
![The recipe to upgrade items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aNM8pAgS/images/5f56e660e15f1f9abf5ade1886a11db8d131a745.png)
